experimental_design: significant differences between the gill mucus metabolome composition of susceptible and non-susceptible fish
number_of_fractions: polar (fraction H2O/MeOH) and apolar (fraction MeOH/CH2Cl2) fractions
number_of_biological_replicates: four butterflyfish species (C. lunulatus, C. ornatissimus, C. reticulatus, and C. vagabundus)
